# Gary Innerarity - Solutions Engineer, MBA

> Gary Innerarity is a Solutions Engineer and MBA based in the United States, focused on enterprise agentic AI systems, LLM orchestration, digital thread platforms, digital twin simulations, cloud infrastructure, and platform engineering.

Profile summary:
- Full name: Gary Innerarity
- Credentials: MBA
- Role: Solutions Engineer
- Location: United States
- Last updated: 2026-04-08

## Identity

- [Gary Innerarity Portfolio](https://garyinnerarity.com/): Primary website and portfolio home.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/garyinnerarity/): Professional profile.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ospf2fullstack): Public code and repositories.

## Expertise

- [Agentic AI and LLM orchestration](https://garyinnerarity.com/#skills): Multi-agent workflows, MCP, and tool-driven automation.
- [Architecture notes and deep dives](https://garyinnerarity.com/#notes): Written material on architecture patterns and operations.
- [Digital thread and simulation portfolio](https://garyinnerarity.com/#work): Enterprise work spanning digital thread and digital twin systems.
- [Technical stack overview](https://garyinnerarity.com/#stack): Cloud, platform engineering, and infrastructure expertise.

## Certifications

- [Credentials section](https://garyinnerarity.com/#credentials): Certification highlights and supporting details.

## Enterprise Projects

- [Agentic Coder and AI workflow initiatives](https://garyinnerarity.com/#work): Enterprise-grade coding and workflow automation systems.
- [Agents, Skills, and Tools](https://garyinnerarity.com/#skills): Composable agent capabilities and custom tool integration patterns.
- [Digital Thread Platform](https://garyinnerarity.com/#work): Cross-system traceability and lifecycle integration.
- [Digital Twin Simulations](https://garyinnerarity.com/#work): Virtual modeling for predictive analysis and scenario planning.
- [Automated Cyber Compliance](https://garyinnerarity.com/#work): Policy-as-code and audit pipeline implementation.
- [Terraform Module Library and IaC patterns](https://garyinnerarity.com/#stack): Multi-cloud reusable infrastructure modules.
- [Monte Carlo Simulator and analytics](https://garyinnerarity.com/#work): Probabilistic decision-support tooling.
- [Digital Catalog and data ingestion](https://garyinnerarity.com/#work): Structured cataloging for BIM, reality capture, and 3D assets.
- [Magie-Coder](https://garyinnerarity.com/#work): Internal enterprise coding assistant implemented in 2026.

## Personal Projects

- [Learners of Tomorrow, LLC](https://www.learnersoftomorrow.com/): Free EdTech training platform.
- [Silence Broken, Inc.](https://silencebrokennow.org/): Nonprofit supporting survivors; board and treasury leadership.
- [Bluebird Professionals, LLC](https://www.bluebirdprofessionals.com/): Bookkeeping and small business growth consulting.
- [La Maestra Loca](https://www.lamaestraloca.com/): Long-running cloud-hosted WordPress site.
- [Personal projects overview](https://garyinnerarity.com/#work): Additional private and homelab project context.
